content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (iter-028)

## CRITICAL / HIGH

1. **FBC glue: STOP the fold family ‚Äî pivot to `CatCommSq.hComp` (lean-vs-blueprint-checker + prover).**
   The eqToIso boundary-bridge fold is DECISIVELY REFUTED (two cold builds + LSP). Do NOT re-assign any
   eqToIso-bridge / abstract-cocycle FOLD variant ‚Äî it relocates but cannot eliminate the compounded
   telescope-adjacency defeq (inline-`rfl` ‚áí build-compounds >200k @L2258; fvar ‚áí un-collapsible,
   `eqToIso_refl` only fires on syntactic `X=X`). Route for iter-028 (`analogies/fbc-fold-adjacency.md`):
   register each `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso` leg + the 2 comparison legs as `CatCommSq` instances
   (`CatCommSq.mk <natiso>`), build LHS/RHS by `hComp`/`vComp`, the glue = equality of the two pastes'
   `.iso`, extract `.app M` ONCE at the end via `congrArg (¬∑.hom.app M)`. Composition adjacency is the
   shared FUNCTOR (`tilde`/`pullback (Spec _)`/`extendScalars`) matched structurally by `Functor.comp`
   congruence ‚Äî no heavy OBJECT defeq forced. NEVER `simp [hComp_iso_hom_app]` against the goal (re-crosses
   carriers). If this also fails ‚Üí glue genuinely stuck after 10 iters ‚Üí pivot to a different proof of the
   crux `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural`, NOT another fold.

2. **FBC blueprint `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` ‚Äî dispatch a blueprint-writer (lvbc-fbc027 must-fix).**
   I added `% NOTE (iter-027 review)` markers at `lem:ring_square_cocycle` and `‚Ä¶mate_glue`, but the
   prose REWRITE is a writer job: (a) downgrade both blocks' proof prose to OPEN (the "realized fold"
   claims are refuted), (b) **reconcile `lem:ring_square_cocycle`'s STATEMENT with the Lean** ‚Äî the
   formalized signature is a bare 6-iso + 6-`eqToIso`-bridge skeleton that DROPS hypotheses (i)‚Äì(iv) and
   is false-as-written/sorry-patched, so EITHER restate the blueprint as the bridged-telescope skeleton OR
   keep the mate-calculus statement and have the prover upgrade the Lean signature (the latter is moot if
   the CatCommSq route supersedes the cocycle). (c) Fix/drop the stale commented Lean citation of the
   nonexistent `lem:ring_square_glue_natTrans` label.

3. **SNAP prover lane (iter-028, per plan iter-027).** Blueprint `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` was
   rewired to the section-element `Œì(Œ∑)`-pushforward route. GATE: run the mandatory blueprint-reviewer +
   blueprint-clean on the rewritten chapter BEFORE the prover (deferred from iter-027). Watch signal: if
   the section-level `Œì(Œ∑)`-pushforward re-summons the Œº-boundary in the `sectionsMul`-whiskering
   naturality bricks, the wall moved one layer down ‚Äî re-consult the analogist before churning.

## MEDIUM

4. **FBC no-op `set_option maxHeartbeats` guards (lean-auditor must-fix √ó2).** `FlatBaseChange.lean`
   L2374 (before `/-! ### Seam 2 -/`) and L2409‚Äì2412 (before `/-! ### Seam 3 -/`): `set_option X in cmd`
   is consumed by the `/-! -/` doc-comment command, leaving `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` (L2432)
   and the Seam-2 decls UNGUARDED ‚Äî will break cold build once their gating sorries close. These live in
   the dead-mate apparatus slated for excision; fold into a dedicated FBC refactor iter (move each
   `set_option N in` to immediately precede the theorem, after the doc comment) OR excise the apparatus.
   Also: triple-redundant stacked `set_option` L2409‚Äì2411 (minor ‚Äî collapse to one).

5. **SNAP visibility asymmetry (lean-auditor major).** `MonoidalPresheaf`, `pshModMonoidal`,
   `pshModBraided`, `pshModSymmetric`, `Wsheaf` are `private` in `SectionGradedRing.lean` but PUBLIC in
   `SectionGradedRingLocalized.lean` (same namespace). Safe today (no shared importer) but a latent
   duplicate-declaration kernel error if any future module imports both. Make them consistently `private`
   in `SectionGradedRingLocalized.lean` (or document the intentional divergence) during the next SNAP
   refactor touch.

6. **FBC archaeology cleanup (lean-auditor major).** Prune the 60-line dead `ring_square_glue_natTrans`
   block (L1950‚Äì2009) to a 3‚Äì5 line summary and migrate the ~220-line iter-018‚Üí027 inline proof-journal
   above the `‚Ä¶mate_glue` `sorry` (L2041‚Äì2264) to `analogies/` ‚Äî leave ‚â§10‚Äì15 lines of current blockers.
   Low math risk; do it in the same iter as the dead-mate excision.

## Coverage debt (planner: restore 1-to-1 blueprint correspondence)
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = **84** `lean_aux` nodes, all pre-existing (‚âà67 SNAP
  `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.*` helpers ‚Äî `RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*`, `MonoidalPresheaf`, etc.;
  ‚âà15 FBC helpers). No materially new debt this iter. Blueprint each so the dependency graph sees them.

## Blocked ‚Äî do NOT re-assign without a structural change
- **`pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_mate_glue` via any abstract-cocycle FOLD** (carrier-bearing /
  carrier-free / eqToIso-bridge): all three refuted across iters 024/026/027. Only the `CatCommSq.hComp`
  functor-level paste (rec 1) is a genuinely new structure; everything in the `‚â™‚â´`-telescope family is dead.
- **SNAP Option-A `‚äó_loc` re-base**: refuted iter-027 by a kernel TYPE mismatch (not a timeout) ‚Äî the
  localized tensor object is NOT defeq to `sheafification.obj (F‚ô≠‚äóG‚ô≠)`. Permanently dead; do NOT retry.
- **SNAP object-level associator wall** (`tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native`): OFF the critical path; STOP
  iterating ‚Äî the section-level route bypasses it.
